repo_state: bare repository with main branch, feature branch and annotated tag
notes: http-backend advertises stock-matching smart HTTP upload-pack ref lines and upload-pack advertisement content type
http-backend resolves ScriptAlias-style PATH_TRANSLATED repository paths and advertises stock-matching upload-pack ref lines

repo_state: non-bare repository with main and feature branches
notes: http-backend serves ScriptAlias-style non-bare repository discovery with stock-matching upload-pack ref lines

repo_state: bare repository with shared base commit and changed blobs
notes: upload-pack POST returns a stock-readable sideband pack, ACKs the common have, includes delta objects and omits common base objects

repo_state: bare repository with tree and blob objects
notes: upload-pack filter blob:none returns a stock-readable sideband pack that keeps tree objects and omits blob objects

repo_state: bare repository with small and large blobs
notes: upload-pack filter blob:limit=10 returns a stock-readable sideband pack that keeps the small blob and omits the large blob

repo_state: bare repository with root and nested blobs
notes: upload-pack filter object:type=blob returns a stock-readable sideband pack that includes root and nested blobs while omitting tree objects

repo_state: bare repository with nested tree structure
notes: upload-pack filter tree:2 returns a stock-readable sideband pack that includes root-level blob and first-level tree while omitting second-level tree/blob objects

repo_state: bare repository with root and nested blobs
notes: upload-pack combined filter applies object:type=blob and tree:2 together, keeping the root blob while omitting nested blob and tree objects

repo_state: bare repository with sparse specification blob
notes: upload-pack sparse:oid filter returns a stock-readable sideband pack that includes blobs matched by the sparse spec and omits unmatched blobs

repo_state: bare repository with three-commit linear history
notes: upload-pack deepen 1 emits the wanted head as the shallow boundary and returns a stock-readable pack that includes the head while omitting its parent

combination: upload-pack POST with time-limited shallow request
repo_state: bare repository with dated linear history
notes: upload-pack deepen-since emits the wanted head as the shallow boundary and returns a stock-readable pack that includes the head while omitting older parent history

combination: upload-pack POST excluding named ref history
repo_state: bare repository with base and main branch histories
notes: upload-pack deepen-not refs/heads/base emits the wanted head as the shallow boundary and omits excluded base ref history from the returned pack

combination: upload-pack POST with existing shallow boundary and deepen 1
repo_state: bare repository with existing shallow client boundary
notes: upload-pack deepen-relative extends an existing shallow boundary by one commit, emits the parent as the new shallow boundary and omits the grandparent
